message:
fix(pages): wrangler auth check hangs on headless servers

wrangler whoami can hang indefinitely on headless/SSH servers when
trying to reach the Cloudflare API, causing bv --pages to always
report "wrangler not authenticated" even when valid credentials exist.

Fix: check CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN env var first, then check the wrangler
config file (~/.config/.wrangler/config/default.toml) directly for a
valid oauth_token. Only fall back to wrangler whoami (with a 10s
timeout) if neither fast check succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
